bank.name: Bank Name
label.name: Name
message.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
message.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.
message.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
message.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
page.home.title: Welcome to Bank Profiles
page.home.subtitle: Compare and explore banks worldwide
page.home.description: Discover comprehensive information about banks including ratings, technical specifications, fees, and more. Make informed decisions with our detailed bank profiles and comparisons.
page.home.noBanks: No banks available at the moment.
page.banks.title: Banks Directory
page.banks.noMatch: No banks match your search criteria.
page.ratings.title: Bank Ratings
page.contacts.title: Contact Us
page.contacts.description: Have questions or need assistance? We're here to help. Reach out to us through any of the channels below.
page.contacts.noteText: We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24 hours during business days.
page.about.title: About Bank Profiles
page.about.missionText: We provide comprehensive, unbiased information about banks worldwide to help consumers and businesses make informed financial decisions.
page.about.dataSourcesText: Our data is sourced from official bank publications, regulatory filings, and verified public information to ensure accuracy and reliability.
page.about.ratingSystemText: Our proprietary rating system evaluates banks across multiple criteria:
page.about.feature1Text: Detailed ratings across multiple criteria to help you compare banks objectively.
page.about.feature2Text: Filter and search banks by currency, premium banking availability, and more.
page.about.feature3Text: Access bank information seamlessly from any device, anywhere.
page.about.disclaimerText: Information provided is for educational purposes only. Always verify current information with the respective bank before making financial decisions.
page.bankDetail.notFound: Bank not found. The requested bank does not exist or has been removed.
page.bankDetail.transactionRoutes.empty: No transaction destinations are configured for this bank.
page.bankDetail.transactionRoutes.unmapp: Some destinations could not be mapped:
page.submitBank.title: Submit a New Bank
page.submitBank.description: Share a bank that should be added to the directory. Admins will review your submission before publishing.
page.submitBank.successMessage: Thanks! Your request is now pending admin review.
page.submitBank.errorGeneric: Unable to submit your request right now. Please try again.
page.adminSubmissions.title: Bank Submission Review
page.adminFeedback.title: Metric Feedback Moderation
page.adminFeedback.disabled: Feedback moderation is available only in development mode.
page.adminFeedback.selectDetails: Choose a pending item from the left panel to approve or reject.
page.rateBank.title: Rate this bank
page.rateBank.description: Rate all five criteria from 0 to 10. Your submission updates the public rating data.
page.rateBank.commentPlaceholder: Add context for your ratings (sources, recent experience, or updates).
page.rateBank.success.title: Thanks for your rating!
page.rateBank.success.message: Your rating has been recorded and public ratings were updated.
page.rateBank.error.bankNotFound: Bank not found. Please return to the bank list and try again.
page.rateBank.error.missingCriteria: Rating criteria are currently unavailable. Please try again later.
page.rateBank.error.missingRatings: Please provide a rating for every criterion.
page.rateBank.error.invalidRange: Each criterion rating must be between 0 and 10.
page.rateBank.error.rateLimit: You have reached the daily rating submission limit. Please try again tomorrow.
page.rateBank.error.generic: Unable to submit your rating right now. Please try again.
page.metricSuggestion.title: Submit Metric Suggestion
page.metricSuggestion.description: Help us improve bank profile accuracy by suggesting a new metric or correction.
page.metricSuggestion.instructions: Provide detailed information for the metric suggestion you want reviewed. All fields marked with * are required.
metricSuggestion.success.title: Suggestion Submitted!
metricSuggestion.success.message: Your metric suggestion was submitted successfully. Thank you for helping improve our data quality.
page.feedback.title: Submit Metric Feedback
page.feedback.description: Help us improve bank profile accuracy by suggesting corrections or updates to metrics.
page.feedback.instructions: Please provide detailed information about the metric you'd like to suggest an improvement for. All fields marked with * are required.
feedback.generalFeedback: General Feedback (Not specific to a bank)
feedback.explainChanges: Please explain why this change is needed and provide supporting information
feedback.success.title: Thank You!
feedback.success.message: Your feedback has been submitted successfully. We appreciate your contribution to improving our data accuracy.
feedback.error.title: Submission Failed
feedback.error.generic: An error occurred while submitting your feedback. Please try again.
feedback.error.rateLimit: You have reached the maximum number of submissions for today. Please try again tomorrow.
feedback.error.validation: Please check your input and ensure all required fields are filled correctly.
feedback.validation.explanationMinLength: Explanation must be at least 20 characters
feedback.rateLimit.exceeded: Daily submission limit reached. Resets in {0} hours.
metric.description.default: Detailed information for this metric is being prepared.
metric.description.bankStatus: Shows whether the bank is currently operating and available to customers.
metric.description.founded: The year the bank was established.
metric.description.bankType: Identifies the institution type, such as retail, corporate, or universal bank.
metric.description.overallRating: Combined score based on public ratings and profile criteria.
metric.description.clientSatisfaction: Share of retail clients satisfied with the bank's services.
metric.description.corporateSatisfaction: Share of business clients satisfied with service quality.
metric.description.openIssues: Number of unresolved reported issues related to service, operations, or support.
metric.description.totalClients: Approximate total number of customers served by the bank.
metric.description.swiftAvailable: Indicates whether the bank can send and receive SWIFT transfers.
metric.description.ibanSupported: Indicates whether the bank supports IBAN account formats.
metric.description.sepaAvailable: Indicates whether SEPA payments are supported.
metric.description.localClearing: Shows whether domestic clearing infrastructure is available.
metric.description.instantTransfers: Shows whether near real-time money transfers are supported.
metric.description.cardSystems: Card payment networks supported by the bank.
metric.description.availableCurrencies: Currencies available for accounts, transfers, or settlements.
metric.description.multiCurrencyAccounts: Indicates whether customers can hold multiple currencies in one account.
metric.description.fxMarkup: Average markup applied when converting between currencies.
metric.description.cryptoExposure: Declared level of involvement with crypto-related services or assets.
metric.description.physicalBranches: Number of physical branch offices operated by the bank.
metric.description.atmCount: Total number of ATMs available to customers.
metric.description.incomingDomesticFee: Fee charged for receiving domestic transfers.
metric.description.incomingInternational: Fee charged for receiving international transfers.
metric.description.outgoingDomesticFee: Fee charged for sending domestic transfers.
metric.description.outgoingInternational: Fee charged for sending international transfers.
metric.description.atmLocalWithdrawal: Fee for cash withdrawal at domestic ATMs.
metric.description.atmInternationalWithd: Fee for cash withdrawal at foreign ATMs.
metric.description.monthlyMaintenanceFee: Recurring monthly fee for maintaining the account.
metric.description.premiumCardAnnualFee: Annual fee for premium card products.
metric.description.sanctionsRisk: Current sanctions exposure assessment for the bank.
metric.description.governmentAffiliate: Indicates whether the bank is state-owned or government-affiliated.
metric.description.complaintRatio: Share of complaints relative to the active client base.
metric.description.avgRemediationDays: Average time needed to resolve customer issues.
metric.description.redFlags: Count of risk flags identified in recent reviews.
metric.description.mobileApp: Indicates whether a mobile banking app is available.
metric.description.webBanking: Indicates whether web-based internet banking is available.
metric.description.iosApp: Indicates whether the mobile app is available on iOS.
metric.description.androidApp: Indicates whether the mobile app is available on Android.
metric.description.biometricAuthenticati: Indicates whether biometric login is supported.
metric.description.apiAccessAvailable: Indicates whether API connectivity is available for integrations.
metric.description.support24x7: Indicates whether customer support is available 24/7.
metric.description.supportChannels: Customer support channels offered by the bank.
metric.description.avgResponseTimeMinute: Average support response time in minutes.
